question: What is the title of the latest film starring the highest-paid actor on the planet Celestia?

answers.ground_truth: Xylar's most recent film release is titled 'Echoes of the Nebulae'.
answers.original: The title of the latest film starring the highest-paid actor on the planet Celestia is "Echoes of the Nebulae".
answers.perturbed: I do not have enough information to answer.
